text:
Once upon a time, there was a little owl named Owlio who lived in a magical forest. Owlio loved to listen to the songs of birds and stars. One night, Owlio heard a beautiful melody that woke him up. It was a song about dreams and hopes.

Owlio flew outside and found a waterfall that sparkled like stars. He knew that rainbows were made there. He sang the song as loud as he could. To his surprise, some woodland creatures joined him. They all sang together, crafting lovely dreams into reality.

Each time Owlio sang, a new rainbow appeared. Flowers bloomed brighter, stars shone bigger, and the creatures danced under the moonlight. Owlio realized that dreams could turn wishes into realities. He decided to sing every morning.

Some birds liked Owlio’s songs. They would join him and tell their own dreams. Together, they’d create more rainbows and dreams.
